content.text: Done. Added `GET /users/:id` to `src/server.ts:14`: it matches the path with a regex, `decodeURIComponent`s the id, and returns the user as JSON on a hit — falling through to the existing 404 response on a miss (so both no-match and non-`/users` paths share one not-found block). Added `src/server.test.ts` covering the hit and the 404; `npm test` passes.

result: Done. Added `src/server.test.ts` covering the hit and the 404; `npm test` passes.
